tools.name: get_schedule
tools.description: Read the user's calendar via connected provider.

tools.name: add_to_calendar
tools.description: Add an event via connected provider.

tools.name: get_vitana_index
tools.description: Return the user's current Vitana Index.

tools.name: get_index_improvement_suggestions
tools.description: Suggest concrete actions to lift the Index.

tools.name: save_diary_entry
tools.description: Save a diary entry from voice.

tools.name: record_journey_answer
tools.description: Record a Journey Foundation answer (goal, economy stance, focus, teaching ack); writes the real record and returns the next guided move.

tools.name: delete_reminder
tools.description: Delete one or all reminders (after confirm).

tools.name: view_intent_matches
tools.description: View matches on a specific intent, or omit intent_id to aggregate all the user's matches and open the My Matches screen.

tools.name: get_matchmaker_result
tools.description: Poll for matchmaker agent's polished result.

tools.name: recall_conversation_at_time
tools.description: Recall a past conversation by time reference.

tools.name: report_to_specialist
tools.description: Hand off to a specialist persona (Devon/Sage/Atlas/Mira).

tools.name: set_capability_preference
tools.description: Choose default provider for a capability.

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read email via connected Gmail account.

tools.name: consult_external_ai
tools.description: Delegate a question to a connected external AI.

tools.name: create_index_improvement_plan
tools.description: Schedule a calendar plan to lift a pillar.

tools.name: ask_pillar_agent
tools.description: Ask a pillar-specific agent a question.

tools.name: resolve_recipient
tools.description: Map a name to a community member user_id.

tools.name: send_chat_message
tools.description: Send a DM to another member.

tools.name: share_link
tools.description: Share a deep link with another member.

tools.name: share_intent_post
tools.description: Share an intent post with someone.

tools.name: scan_existing_matches
tools.description: Scan for new matches on existing intents.

tools.name: navigate_to_screen
tools.description: Navigate to a canonical app screen.

tools.name: log_exercise
tools.description: Log an exercise session (minutes + activity type).

tools.name: get_pillar_subscores
tools.description: Break down a pillar score into baseline/completions/data/streak.

tools.name: get_top_in_pillar
tools.description: Top scorer in a single pillar.

tools.name: ask_who_is
tools.description: NL router for free-form 'who is...?' questions.

tools.name: list_diary_entries
tools.description: List the user's diary entries in a date window.

tools.name: recall_memory_about
tools.description: Topic search across memory items with category filter.

tools.name: get_memory_garden_summary
tools.description: Counts per memory category — for 'what do you remember about me?'.

tools.name: forget_memory
tools.description: Soft-delete a single memory item by id (after confirm).

tools.name: reschedule_event
tools.description: Move a calendar event to a new time.

tools.name: find_free_slot
tools.description: Find next available slot for a duration.

tools.name: get_event_details
tools.description: Read full details of a single event.

tools.name: check_calendar_conflicts
tools.description: Find events overlapping a proposed window.

tools.name: snooze_reminder
tools.description: Push a reminder out by N minutes.

tools.name: list_missed_reminders
tools.description: List reminders that fired but weren't acked.

tools.name: join_group
tools.description: Join an existing group by id.

tools.name: invite_to_group
tools.description: Invite a member to a group.

tools.name: global_search
tools.description: Unified search across people / posts / products / events.

tools.name: list_upcoming_meetups
tools.description: List upcoming meetups near the user.

tools.name: explain_recommendation
tools.description: Get a natural-language reason for a recommendation.

tools.name: dispute_match
tools.description: Open a dispute on a match.

tools.name: set_alarm
tools.description: Set a wake-up alarm at HH:MM.

tools.name: get_world_time
tools.description: Current local time in a city or IANA timezone.

tools.description: Flagship deep search — fuses pillar deficits, Life Compass goal, and multi-criteria filters into top-3 product picks with rationale.

tools.description: Flagship practitioner / coach / doctor search with multi-criteria filtering.

tools.name: find_perfect_match
tools.description: Flagship people-match search (workout partner, accountability buddy, mentor).
